# Best AI Video Tools for Stop Motion Animation in 2026

Stop motion is a beautiful art form, but it's incredibly time-consuming. AI tools help you create smoother stop motion faster!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/9|Runway]]: Stop Motion Enhancement

[[link:/tools/9|Runway]] offers powerful tools for enhancing stop motion animation.

### Runway for Stop Motion
- **Frame interpolation**: Smooth out choppy movement
- **Stabilization**: Fix shaky camera work
- **Motion tracking**: Add effects to moving objects

**Try Runway**: https://runwayml.com

---

## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: Stop Motion Editing

[[link:/tools/51|VEED]] makes editing stop motion videos simple.

### VEED for Stop Motion
- **Frame-by-frame editing**: Precise control
- **Speed adjustment**: Perfect your timing
- **Background music**: Add the perfect soundtrack

**Try VEED**: https://veed.io

---
